name: AIRWA INC.
business: The company, through its subsidiary YYEM, licenses advanced patents and AI-powered matchmaking technology to partners worldwide, enabling localized matchmaking experiences. It also generates royalties from licensing its technology. Additionally, it is developing a social networking vertical to create and sell content to TikTok for users in the MENA region.
sellsTo: business-to-business (B2B) licensees covering specific geographic regions

exposures.sentence: Through YYEM, we own advanced patents and other proprietary technology which we license out, and we are using this intellectual property to develop an AI-powered matchmaking platform to license to partners worldwide, enabling them to create localized matchmaking experiences tailored to their specific markets and cultures.

We possess six technologies related to the metaverse and five AI matchmaking patents, which together enable access to both Augmented Reality (AR) and eXtended Reality (XR), enhancing our future revenue growth potential in the online matchmaking segment.

YYEM is also developing a social networking vertical to create and sell content to TikTok for its users in the Middle East and North Africa (the MENA region), which we anticipate will provide an independent revenue stream capitalizing on TikTok’s strength in the MENA region relative to the uncertainty the app faces in the United States.
Our AI technology is also designed to integrate with existing Big Data models and other larger AI models, such as Huawei Pangu, Baidu 6 Wenxinyiyan, Alibaba Tongyi, and Tencent Hunyuan.

catalysts.event: Appointment of additional independent director to regain Nasdaq compliance
catalysts.sentence: The Company intends to appoint an additional independent director to serve as a member of the Board and the Audit Committee prior to the end of the cure period described above.

tamClaims.claim: The global online dating market is worth multiple billions of dollars annually, with most estimates of dating app revenue being between $6 billion and $9 billion in each of 2023 and 2024. Global growth is forecast to be between 6% and 9% per year through the rest of the decade.
tamClaims.sentence: The global online dating market is worth multiple billions of dollars annually, with most estimates of dating app revenue being between $6 billion and $9 billion in each of 2023 and 2024. Global growth is forecast to be between 6% and 9% per year through the rest of the decade.
